invariant_en: Mechanic observation does not imply pedagogical or rubric inference.

tests.prompt_en: Does Space start the game from the start screen?
tests.observed_en: Game window detected (My project (3)); Space input injected. Start-panel state change not directly observable in this environment (no visual capture).
observed_allowed_examples_en: start panel remained visible after Space

tests.prompt_en: Does jump work after the game has started?
tests.observed_en: Space input sent repeatedly after start attempt; jump state not observable from Player.log alone.
observed_allowed_examples_en: player jumped on Space when grounded
Space triggered start instead of jump

tests.observed_en: No score change signal observed in Player.log during movement pass; cup contact not confirmed in this pass.
observed_allowed_examples_en: score UI incremented on cup collection
no score change on cup contact

tests.prompt_en: Does the third cup trigger a level transition?
tests.observed_en: Third-cup level transition not reached in this assisted pass; scene mismatch hypothesis not runtime-confirmed nor refuted.
observed_allowed_examples_en: level transition failed or error observed

tests.prompt_en: What happens when the timer reaches zero?
tests.observed_en: Timer zero condition not observed in this pass (120s not elapsed); prior code review remains sole source for no-consequence hypothesis.
observed_allowed_examples_en: timer reached 00:00 with no gameplay consequence
game over triggered at timer zero
level failed state observed at timer zero

tests.prompt_en: What happens when all three lives are lost?
tests.observed_en: Three-life exhaustion sequence not executed in this assisted pass.
observed_allowed_examples_en: game over panel shown after third loss

interactive_phenomenology_summary_en: Interactive mechanic signals were observed without pedagogical inference. Pedagogical and rubric meaning remain unverified.

interactive_phenomenology.invariant_en: Mechanic observation does not imply pedagogical or rubric inference.

playtest_limitations_en: No direct visual/UI observation in this environment; Player.log and input injection only. Human visual pass may resolve inconclusive tests.
